questions.q: In which Indian film industry did N. T. Rama Rao build his acting career?
questions.explanation: N. T. Rama Rao was a legendary actor of Telugu cinema, based primarily in the industry centred on Andhra Pradesh.

questions.q: The actor N. T. Rama Rao is most popularly known by which set of initials?
questions.explanation: N. T. Rama Rao is universally known by the initials NTR.

questions.q: N. T. Rama Rao became especially famous for portraying which type of roles on screen?
questions.explanation: NTR became a defining star through mythological roles, especially gods like Krishna and Rama.

questions.q: In which year was the actor and politician N. T. Rama Rao born?
questions.explanation: N. T. Rama Rao was born in 1923.

questions.q: In which year did N. T. Rama Rao die?
questions.explanation: N. T. Rama Rao died in 1996.

questions.q: Which political party did N. T. Rama Rao found in 1982?
questions.explanation: NTR founded the Telugu Desam Party (TDP) in 1982.

questions.q: N. T. Rama Rao served as Chief Minister of which Indian state?
questions.explanation: NTR served as Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh.

questions.q: Which Hindu deity, known as a charioteer and divine figure, did N. T. Rama Rao famously portray many times on screen?
questions.explanation: NTR became iconic for his repeated portrayals of Lord Krishna in Telugu mythological films.

questions.q: The 1957 fantasy classic Mayabazar, featuring N. T. Rama Rao, was made in which language?
questions.explanation: Mayabazar (1957) was a landmark Telugu film, also made in Tamil, in which NTR played Krishna.

questions.q: How many terms did N. T. Rama Rao serve as Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh?
questions.explanation: NTR served three terms as Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh.

questions.q: Which 1951 fantasy film is widely regarded as the breakthrough that established N. T. Rama Rao as a major star?
questions.explanation: Pathala Bhairavi (1951) was a major commercial success that propelled NTR to stardom.

questions.q: In the 1957 film Mayabazar, which character did N. T. Rama Rao portray?
questions.explanation: In Mayabazar, NTR played Lord Krishna while S. V. Ranga Rao played Ghatotkacha.

questions.q: N. T. Rama Rao was born in a village in which district of present-day Andhra Pradesh?
questions.explanation: NTR was born in Nimmakuru in the Krishna district of present-day Andhra Pradesh.

questions.q: Which fellow Telugu actor was N. T. Rama Rao's most frequent contemporary and on-screen pairing partner, often considered his great rival at the box office?
questions.explanation: Akkineni Nageswara Rao (ANR) was NTR's leading contemporary in Telugu cinema, and the two often co-starred.

questions.q: In which year did N. T. Rama Rao first become Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh after his party's landslide victory?
questions.explanation: NTR became Chief Minister for the first time in 1983, shortly after founding the TDP in 1982.

questions.q: N. T. Rama Rao made his film acting debut in 1949 with which Telugu film?
questions.explanation: NTR made his acting debut with the 1949 Telugu film Mana Desam.

questions.q: Besides Krishna, N. T. Rama Rao was also celebrated for playing which other major deity in mythological films?
questions.explanation: NTR famously portrayed Lord Rama, in addition to Krishna, in several mythological films.

questions.q: In which 1963 Telugu mythological film did N. T. Rama Rao play Lord Rama, with the story drawn from the Ramayana?
questions.explanation: Lava Kusa (1963) was a hugely successful film in which NTR played Lord Rama.

questions.q: In the epic 1977 Telugu film Daana Veera Soora Karna, N. T. Rama Rao famously performed how many distinct lead roles?
questions.explanation: In Daana Veera Soora Karna (1977), NTR played three roles: Karna, Duryodhana and Krishna.

questions.q: N. T. Rama Rao's daughter Nandamuri Bhuvaneswari married which figure who later became Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh?
questions.explanation: NTR's daughter Bhuvaneswari married N. Chandrababu Naidu, who later led the TDP and became Chief Minister.

questions.q: Which popular Telugu superstar is a grandson of N. T. Rama Rao and is himself known by the name 'NTR Jr.'?
questions.explanation: Nandamuri Taraka Rama Rao Jr. (NTR Jr.), a leading Telugu actor, is NTR's grandson.

questions.q: Apart from acting, N. T. Rama Rao was also active in filmmaking in which additional capacity?
questions.explanation: NTR also worked as a director and producer, founding his own banner and helming several mythological films.

questions.q: What was the name of the film production company N. T. Rama Rao founded in the 1950s?
questions.explanation: NTR founded the National Art Theatres (NAT) banner, under which he produced and directed several films.

questions.q: Pathala Bhairavi (1951), the film that boosted N. T. Rama Rao's fame, was produced under which famous banner?
questions.explanation: Pathala Bhairavi was produced by the Vijaya Productions banner founded by Nagi Reddy and Chakrapani.

questions.q: In 1995, N. T. Rama Rao's third term as Chief Minister ended after a political rebellion led by which member of his own party?
questions.explanation: In 1995, N. Chandrababu Naidu led a split within the TDP that removed NTR and made Naidu Chief Minister.

questions.q: During NTR's first term as Chief Minister in 1984, his government was briefly dismissed in a controversial episode involving which of his finance ministers?
questions.explanation: In 1984, Nadendla Bhaskara Rao, NTR's finance minister, engineered a brief coup against NTR's government before NTR was reinstated.

questions.q: One of NTR's signature populist welfare schemes as Chief Minister provided subsidised rice to the poor at what notable price per kilogram?
questions.explanation: NTR's famous 'Rs 2 per kg rice' scheme provided subsidised rice and became a hallmark of his welfare politics.

questions.q: In the 1960 Telugu film Sri Venkateswara Mahatyam, N. T. Rama Rao portrayed which deity?
questions.explanation: In Sri Venkateswara Mahatyam (1960), NTR played Lord Venkateswara, a form of Vishnu.

questions.q: NTR was a key figure in shaping which national opposition coalition of non-Congress parties in the late 1980s?
questions.explanation: NTR was a key figure in forming the National Front, a coalition of non-Congress opposition parties formed in 1988.

questions.q: What is the title of the 2019 Telugu biographical film duology that depicted the life of N. T. Rama Rao, with his son playing him?
questions.explanation: The 2019 biographical duology NTR: Kathanayakudu and NTR: Mahanayakudu starred his son Nandamuri Balakrishna as NTR.
